name: The Tower: Tutorial Floor
description:
WORK IN PROGRESS

Start to a series, still in testing so will be worked on randomly. This serves as the tutorial floor of the tower. The tower floors will differ in the series, I recommend creating a persona with a brief description and your status window for it for the best immersive experience. The tower will assign your initial status window based on your character so if in your initial message it doesn’t show you, you should be able to just say open status window..like I said this is test run and the Tutorial floor, there will be one of on earth and for different floors with different objectives to clear in the future.
creator: Qjfavf
